ValidationRule.description: We can only allow users to change owners to the same OBC tag. GCE team can adjust to other company if needed. TBD/Blank need to be done by GCE
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE ) ,ISCHANGED(OwnerId) ,NOT(CONTAINS('AES,LSDX', TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) )) /*TBD or blank*/ ,CONTAINS('AES,LSDX', TEXT(Owner:User.Owned_by_Company__c)) /*Exclude integration users*/ ,PRIORVALUE(fxOwnerOBC__c) != fxOwnerOBC__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_INTERACTION_009: When transferring TBD, the new owner should match the same company tag as your. As needed, please pick a different user, or ask GCE to perform special owner transfers
